revision.comment: Progress update
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
categorizing unused categories
revision.text:
{{polluted category}}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{Monthly clean up category | toc = toc | type = articles lacking sources | cat = Articles lacking sources | hidden = y | message = }}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{CatTrack}}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}[[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]]'''}}[[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{Filter category by topic}}[[Category:Unused categories]] *'''Please help improve an article in this category by adding [[WP:REFB|references]] to [[WP:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that [[WP:V|verify]] content within the article. Once reliable sources references have been added the unreferenced tag can be removed.'''
==Progress== {{Backlog progress bar|initial=510|goal=0|category=Articles lacking sources from June 2009|unit=articles}}[[Category:Unused categories]]
== History == * As of 4 December 2024, there are 205 articles in this category. * As of 4 October 2024, there are 253 articles in this category. * As of 4 August 2024, there are 263 articles in this category. * As of 5 June 2024, there are 270 articles in this category. * As of 4 April 2024, there are 306 articles in this category. * As of 4 January 2024, there are 362 articles in this category. * As of 4 November 2023, there are 379 articles in this category. * As of 4 September 2023, there are 407 articles in this category. * As of 4 June 2023, there are 421 articles in this category. * As of 4 April 2023, there are 443 articles in this category. * As of 4 February 2023, there are 459 articles in this category. * As of 4 January 2023, there are 465 articles in this category. * As of 4 December 2022, there are 473 articles in this category. * As of 4 November 2022, there are 477 articles in this category. * As of 4 October 2022, there are 484 articles in this category. * As of 5 July 2022, there are 510 articles in this category.

revision.comment: categorizing unused categories
revision.text:
{{polluted category}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]] {{Monthly clean up category | toc = toc | type = articles lacking sources | cat = Articles lacking sources | hidden = y | message = }}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]] {{CatTrack}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]] {{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]]'''}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]] {{Filter category by topic}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]] *'''Please help improve an article in this category by adding [[WP:REFB|references]] to [[WP:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that [[WP:V|verify]] content within the article. Once reliable sources references have been added the unreferenced tag can be removed.'''
==Progress== {{Backlog progress bar|initial=510|goal=0|category=Articles lacking sources from June 2009|unit=articles}}[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:Unused categories]]
== History == * As of 4 December 2024, there are 205 articles in this category. * As of 4 October 2024, there are 253 articles in this category. * As of 4 August 2024, there are 263 articles in this category. * As of 5 June 2024, there are 270 articles in this category. * As of 4 April 2024, there are 306 articles in this category. * As of 4 January 2024, there are 362 articles in this category. * As of 4 November 2023, there are 379 articles in this category. * As of 4 September 2023, there are 407 articles in this category. * As of 4 June 2023, there are 421 articles in this category. * As of 4 April 2023, there are 443 articles in this category. * As of 4 February 2023, there are 459 articles in this category. * As of 4 January 2023, there are 465 articles in this category. * As of 4 December 2022, there are 473 articles in this category. * As of 4 November 2022, there are 477 articles in this category. * As of 4 October 2022, there are 484 articles in this category. * As of 5 July 2022, there are 510 articles in this category.

Once reliable sources references have been added the unreferenced tag can be removed.'''
